action: Open Google Chrome on the computer, and in the address bar, enter 'makemytrip.com' and press Enter to navigate to the website.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps:
is the first action. The task is to open Google Chrome and navigate to 'makemytrip.com'. On the screen, I see two Google Chrome icons (Box ID 43 and Box ID 47). I will left-click on one of the Google Chrome icons (Box ID 43) to open the browser.
Action Description: Open Google Chrome by clicking its icon.

previous action: The previous step was to left-click the Google Chrome icon to open the browser. On the current screen, I see a Google Chrome window open with the address bar visible at the top. This confirms that Chrome has launched successfully. The next step is to enter 'makemytrip.com' in the address bar and press Enter to navigate to the website. The address bar is typically located at the top of the Chrome window, and based on the bounding boxes, Box ID 3 contains the address bar ('https / /hevolve hertzai com/agents/Instructable%2OAgent'). I will select this box to type the new URL.
Action Description: Type 'makemytrip.com' in the Chrome address bar.

previous action: The previous step was to type 'makemytrip.com' in the Chrome address bar. On the current screen, I see the text 'makemytrip.com' present in the address bar, which confirms that the typing action succeeded. However, the browser has not yet navigated to the website; it is still showing the previous page. The next step is to press Enter to navigate to 'makemytrip.com'. I will use the hotkey action to press Enter.
Action Description: Press Enter to navigate to 'makemytrip.com' in the Chrome address bar.
